creator: douglas@douglasthrift.net
text:
Created attachment 179242
sysutils/dtpstree-1.0.3.diff

Updated MASTER_SITES from apt.douglasthrift.net and code.douglasthrift.net to dl1.douglasthrift.net and dl2.douglasthrift.net. Removed obsolete MAN1 macro.

portlint: OK (0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.)
testport: OK (poudriere: 103i386, 103amd64)

The warning is:

  WARN: /usr/local/poudriere/ports/svnhead/sysutils/dtpstree/files/patch-dtpstree.cpp: patch was not generated using ``make makepatch''.  It is recommended to use ``make makepatch'' when you need to [re-]generate a patch to ensure proper patch format.

The patch hasn't changed and is working as is, so I don't see a need to regenerate it.
